session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report all results. DO NOT fix any errors - just run the command and report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci from repository root

session.assistant:
## Summary
The `make fast-ci` command executed but **failed with exit code 2** due to test failures. Here are the results:
### Passing Components: - **AGENTS.md standard**: PASSED - **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1745 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: OK - **ty (type checking)**: All checks passed - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 138 passed - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 123 passed - **Tests (erk-mcp)**: 50 passed
### Failing Components: **Unit Tests (erk)**: 12 failed, 5867 passed (14.01s)
#### Failed Tests Summary: 1. **test_worktree_cleanup.py** (5 failures): - `test_get_pr_info_for_branch_with_open_pr`: AssertionError - expected (123, 'OPEN'), got None - `test_get_pr_info_for_branch_with_merged_pr`: AssertionError - expected (456, 'MERGED'), got None - `test_get_plan_info_for_worktree_with_open_plan`: TypeError - Plan missing 5 required arguments (assignees, created_at, updated_at, metadata, objective_id) - `test_get_plan_info_for_worktree_with_closed_plan`: TypeError - Plan missing 5 required arguments - `test_close_pr_for_branch_closes_open_pr`: assert None == 123 - `test_close_plan_for_worktree_closes_open_plan`: TypeError - Plan missing 5 required arguments - `test_close_plan_for_worktree_returns_none_for_closed_plan`: TypeError - Plan missing 5 required arguments
2. **test_unassign_cmd.py** (5 failures): - `test_unassign_only_no_flags`: TypeError - SlotInfo got unexpected keyword argument 'slot_name' - `test_unassign_with_branch_flag`: TypeError - SlotInfo got unexpected keyword argument 'slot_name' - `test_unassign_with_all_flag`: TypeError - SlotInfo got unexpected keyword argument 'slot_name' - `test_unassign_with_dry_run`: TypeError - SlotInfo got unexpected keyword argument 'slot_name' - `test_unassign_with_force_skips_confirmation`: TypeError - SlotInfo got unexpected keyword argument 'slot_name'
The failures appear to be related to: - **SlotInfo constructor**: Tests using `slot_name` parameter but constructor expects different parameter names - **Plan constructor**: Tests missing required arguments that have been added to the Plan dataclass - **PR info retrieval**: Mock/implementation mismatch causing None returns instead of expected PR info
